title: How to reset your Active Directory password
resolution: Visit https://aka.ms/sspr or call the helpdesk. Self-service reset is available 24/7.

title: VPN connection troubleshooting
resolution: 1. Restart the Cisco AnyConnect client. 2. Check VPN gateway status at status.internal. 3. If issue persists, provide output of `ipconfig /all`.

title: Laptop won't power on
resolution: 1. Hold power button 10s to hard reset. 2. Try known-good charger. 3. If no change, raise P2 ticket for hardware replacement.

title: Microsoft Teams crash on Windows 11
resolution: Known issue with latest auto-update. Workaround: use Teams Web (teams.microsoft.com) until patch is deployed. ETA: 48 hours.

title: Request access to a shared drive or application
resolution: Submit an access request via the IT portal. Manager approval required for non-standard access. SLA: 1 business day.

title: Suspected phishing email
resolution: Do NOT click any links. Forward the email to security@company.com immediately. If you clicked a link, disconnect from network and call the security hotline.

title: Printer not printing
resolution: 1. Clear print queue. 2. Restart print spooler service. 3. Reinstall driver from IT portal.
